shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch illustrating the difference between bundled and unbundled development server approaches.
assets.caption: Hatch illustrating the difference between bundled and unbundled development server approaches.
assets.prompt: Vite's Build Philosophy | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) standing beside two visualization: one side shows a large box labeled "BUNDLE" with dozens of files being fed into it (slow), the other side shows files going directly from server to browser with a lightning bolt (instant). Hatch gestures toward the direct path. Cream background, no speech bubbles. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400×1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch observing a developer frustrated by a slow webpack cold start.
assets.caption: Hatch observing a developer frustrated by a slow webpack cold start.
assets.prompt: Vite's Build Philosophy | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose beside a progress bar that's stuck at 23% — representing a slow webpack cold start. Developer figure (faceless silhouette) looking frustrated at a clock. Cream background, Hatch looking sympathetically at the scene. Aspect 1600×1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.

assets.alt: Hatch examining the native ESM request flow where the browser requests individual modules from Vite.
assets.caption: Hatch examining the native ESM request flow where the browser requests individual modules from Vite.
assets.prompt: Vite's Build Philosophy | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose looking at a diagram: browser on the right, Vite server in the center, individual module files on the left. Arrows show browser requesting specific modules, Vite transforming them individually and returning them — no bundle box in the middle. Clean, technical diagram style. Cream background. Aspect 1800×1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.

assets.alt: Hatch presenting Vite's npm download growth and State of JS satisfaction ranking.
assets.caption: Hatch presenting Vite's npm download growth and State of JS satisfaction ranking.
assets.prompt: Vite's Build Philosophy | evidence-card: Hatch pointing at a bar chart showing weekly npm downloads growing steeply from 2021 to 2023, ending at "5M+". A secondary badge shows "97% satisfaction." Clean data presentation, calm expression. Cream background. Aspect 1600×1000. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. assets.alt: Hatch coaching on the insight that development and production environments need different optimizations.
assets.caption: Hatch coaching on the insight that development and production environments need different optimizations.
assets.prompt: Vite's Build Philosophy | lesson-frame: Hatch in coaching pose with a simple visual behind it: two environments — "DEV" (open, fast, loose) and "PROD" (compact, optimized, bundled) — each with their own appropriate tool. The insight that different contexts need different approaches. Cream background. Aspect 1800×1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
